Appointed 'Consul of the Philosophers' (: An nada shi a matsayin 'Consul of the Philosophers' (Hypatos ton Philosophon), wanda hakan ya sa ya zama shugaban Jami'ar Constantinople.
Under pressure, he enters a monastery an: Sakamakon matsin lamba, ya shiga gidan ibada na sufaye (monastery) inda ya dauki sunan sufanci Michael.
Recalled to the imperial court by Empres: Sarauniya Theodora ta sake kiran sa zuwa fadar sarki.
Composes the 'Chronographia,' his most f: Ya rubuta 'Chronographia', aikinsa na tarihi mafi shahara.
Believed to have died around this year,: Ana kyautata zaton ya mutu a wajen wannan shekarar, kodayake ainihin ranar ba ta da tabbas.
Wrote a detailed and personal history of: Ya rubuta tarihin rayuwar sarakunan Byzantine guda 14 daki-daki da na kashin kansa, wanda har yanzu yake zama babban tushen tarihi na Daular Byzantine ta karni na 11.
As 'Consul of the Philosophers,' he revi: A matsayinsa na 'Consul of the Philosophers', ya farfado da Jami'ar Constantinople sannan ya goyi bayan nazarin falsafar Girka ta da, musamman ta Plato.
Influential Political Advisor: Mai Ba da Shawara na Siyasa mai Tasiri
Served as a high-ranking advisor to mult: Ya yi aiki a matsayin babban mai ba da shawara ga sarakuna da sarauniyoyi da dama, inda ya tsara siyasar Byzantine na tsawon shekaru da yawa ta hanyar iliminsa da diflomasiyya.
What makes Psellos's 'Chronographia' so: Menene ya sa 'Chronographia' ta Psellos ta kasance ta musamman?
Unlike other histories of the time, the: Sabanin sauran tarihin lokacin, 'Chronographia' wani littafi ne na tunawa na kashin kansa, cike da hotunan mutane na musamman, makircin fada, da kuma ra'ayoyin Psellos kansa da hujjojinsa. Ya fi kama da tarihin siyasa na zamani fiye da busasshen tarihin abubuwan da suka faru.
Was he a monk or a politician?: Shin shi sufi ne ko kuwa dan siyasa?
He was both. He was forced to become a m: Ya kasance duka biyun. An tilasta masa zama sufi na wani dan lokaci saboda matsin lamba na siyasa amma da sauri aka sake kiran sa zuwa fadar sarki. Ya daidaita rayuwarsa ta ilimi da addini tare da aikinsa na siyasa mai matukar aiki da buri.
What was his philosophical focus?: Menene abin da ya fi mayar da hankali a kai a falsafa?
Psellos was a Neoplatonist. He sought to: Psellos Neoplatonist ne. Ya nemi ya hada koyarwar Kirista da falsafar Plato da mabiyansa, yana mai imanin cewa hikimar da za ta iya ba da haske ga bangaskiyar Kirista.
Born in the village of Mishaninskaya (la: An haife shi a kauyen Mishaninskaya (wanda daga baya aka sauya wa suna zuwa Lomonosovo) a Lardin Arkhangelsk, Rasha.
At age 19, leaves his village and walks: Yana da shekaru 19, ya bar kauyensa sannan ya yi tafiya a kasa zuwa Moscow don yin rajista a Slavic Greek Latin Academy.
Is sent to Germany to study chemistry, p: An tura shi kasar Jamus don karantar ilimin chemistry, physics, da metallurgy a Jami'ar Marburg.
Returns to Russia and is appointed as an: Ya koma Rasha sannan an nada shi a matsayin mataimakin farfesa a St. Petersburg Academy of Sciences.
Establishes the first research and teach: Ya kafa dakin gwaje-gwaje na chemistry na bincike da koyarwa na farko a Rasha.
Co-founds Moscow State University with h: Ya hada hannu wajen kafa Jami'ar Moscow State tare da mai tallafa masa Ivan Shuvalov, bisa tsarin da ya bayyar.
Observes the transit of Venus and is the: Ya lura da wucewar Venus sannan shi ne mutum na farko da ya gano kuma ya tabbatar da wanzuwar sararin samaniya (atmosphere) a kan wannan duniyar.
Dies of pneumonia in St. Petersburg and: Ya mutu sakamakon ciwon sanyi na huhu (pneumonia) a St. Petersburg sannan aka binne shi a makabartar Lazarevskoe.
Law of Conservation of Mass: Dokar Kiyaye Nauyi (Law of Conservation of Mass)
He stated in a letter to Leonhard Euler: Ya bayyana a cikin wasika zuwa ga Leonhard Euler (1748) cewa a cikin gwajin chemistry, nauyin abubuwan da aka hada daidai yake da nauyin abubuwan da aka samu, wanda ya zama tushen dokar kiyaye nauyi.
He conceived of and, with Ivan Shuvalov,: Ya kirkiro kuma, tare da Ivan Shuvalov, ya kafa jami'a ta farko ta Rasha a Moscow a shekarar 1755, wadda yanzu ke dauke da sunansa.
During the 1761 transit of Venus, he was: Lokacin wucewar Venus a shekarar 1761, shi ne mutum na farko da ya bayyana ra'ayin cewa akwai sararin samaniya a kan Venus bisa ga abin da ya gani na 'Lomonosov's arc'.
Published 'Russian Grammar' (1755), whic: Ya buga 'Russian Grammar' (1755), wanda ya daidaita harshen adabi na Rasha ta hanyar banbance tsakanin salo na Sama, Tsakiya, da na Kasa, wanda ya tsara harshen Rasha na zamani.
He rediscovered and revived the ancient: Ya sake gano kuma ya farfado da fasahar mosaic ta da, inda ya kafa masana'anta don kera gilashin kala-kala da kuma samar da manyan ayyukan fasahar mosaic.
Is it true Lomonosov walked all the way: Shin da gaske ne Lomonosov ya yi tafiya a kasa har zuwa Moscow?
Yes, it is a famous and true part of his: E, wani shahararren labari ne kuma na gaskiya a tarihin rayuwarsa. A lokacin sanyi na shekarar 1730, yana da shekaru 19, ya bar kauyensa tare da ayarin motocin daukar kifi sannan ya yi tafiya sama da kilomita 1,000 (fiye da mil 600) zuwa Moscow don neman ilimin da ba zai iya samu ba a gida.
What is Lomonosov's most important scien: Menene babban gudunmawar kimiyya mafi mahimmanci ta Lomonosov?
It is difficult to choose one, but his f: Yana da wuya a zabi guda daya, amma tsara tsarin dokar kiyaye nauyi a fannin chemistry da kuma gano sararin samaniya na Venus suna cikin mafi mahimmanci. Kafa Jami'ar Moscow da ya yi shi ne gadonsa mafi dorewa ga ilimi.
Why is he called the 'Father of Russian: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Uban Kimiyyar Rasha'?
He earned this title for his foundationa: Ya sami wannan lakabi ne saboda ayyukansa na asali wajen kafa cibiyoyin kimiyya na Rasha, ciki har da dakin gwaje-gwaje na farko na chemistry a Rasha da kuma Jami'ar Moscow, da kuma bincikensa daban-daban wadanda suka tabbatar da cewa mutanen Rasha za su iya yin fice a manyan matakai na kimiyya.
Was Lomonosov also a poet?: Shin Lomonosov ya kasance mawaƙi kuma?
Yes, he was a major figure in 18th-centu: E, ya kasance babban mutum a adabin Rasha na karni na 18. Ya rubuta wakoki na yabo (odes), wakoki, da wasannin kwaikwayo na bakin ciki, kuma aikinsa a kan tsarin harshen Rasha ya taimaka wajen daidaita harshen adabi da mawaƙan da suka biyo baya suka yi amfani da shi, ciki har da Pushkin.
Born in Hadiach, Poltava Governorate, Ru: An haife shi a Hadiach, Lardin Poltava, Daular Rasha.
Studied at Kyiv University and became a: Ya yi karatu a Jami'ar Kyiv sannan ya zama babban memba na kungiyar dalibai ta 'Hromada'.
Became a docent (lecturer) in ancient hi: Ya zama malami (docent) a tarihin da a Jami'ar Kyiv.
Dismissed from his post following the Em: An kori shi daga aikinsa sakamakon dokar Ems Ukaz wadda ta haramta harshen Ukraine, sannan ya tafi gudun hijira na siyasa.
Founded the influential Ukrainian-langua: Ya kafa shahararren mujallar siyasa ta harshen Ukraine 'Hromada' a Geneva, Switzerland.
Accepted a professorship at the Universi: Ya karbi aikin farfesa a Jami'ar Sofia da ke Bulgaria.
Died in Sofia, Bulgaria, and was buried: Ya mutu a Sofia, Bulgaria, sannan aka binne shi a can.
He was one of the first and most influen: Ya kasance daya daqun masu ra'ayin gurguzu na farko kuma mafi tasiri a Ukraine, inda ya hada manufofin gurguzu da kishin kasa na cin gashin kai.
Founded and edited the influential polit: Ya kafa kuma ya gyara mujallar siyasa ta 'Hromada' a Geneva, wadda ta zama muhimmiyar kafa ta tunanin siyasar Ukraine a gudun hijira.
Developed a comprehensive political theo: Ya tsara cikakken tunanin siyasa don sake tsara Daulolin Rasha da Austro-Hungarian a matsayin tarayya don ba wa kasashe kamar Ukraine damar cin gashin kai.
He was a major intellectual influence on: Ya kasance babban jagora na ilimi ga shugabannin Ukraine na gaba, ciki har da 'yar yayarsa, shahararriyar marubuciya Lesia Ukrainka.
What was the Ems Ukaz and how did it aff: Menene Ems Ukaz kuma yaya ya shafi Drahomanov?
It was an 1876 decree by Tsar Alexander: Wata doka ce ta shekarar 1876 ta Tsar Alexander II wadda ta takaita amfani da harshen Ukraine a rubuce sosai. Adawar Drahomanov ga wannan doka da sauran manufofi makamantansu ta kai ga korarsa daga Jami'ar Kyiv sannan ta tilasta masa tafiya gudun hijira.
Was Drahomanov a nationalist?: Shin Drahomanov mai kishin kasa (nationalist) ne?
His views were nuanced. He was a patriot: Ra'ayoyinsa suna da zurfi. Ya kasance mai kishin kasa wanda ya goyi bayan hakki da al'adun Ukraine, amma ya soki kishin kasa na bangaranci ko wariya. Ya goyi bayan tsarin tarayya inda Ukraine za ta sami damar cin gashin kai tare da sauran kasashe, maimakon rabuwa gaba daya.
What was his relationship with Lesia Ukr: Yaya dangantakarsa take da Lesia Ukrainka?
He was her maternal uncle and a profound: Ya kasance kawunta (daga wajen mahaifiya) kuma babban jagoran ilimi gare ta. Tunaninsa na siyasa da al'umma, wadanda suka raba ta hanyar wasiku da dama, sun yi tasiri sosai a kan ayyukanta na adabi da kuma ci gaban siyasar kanta.
Why did he move from Geneva to Sofia?: Me yasa ya tashi daga Geneva zuwa Sofia?
While Geneva was a center for his publis: Kodayake Geneva ita ce cibiyar buga litattafansa, kungiyarsa ta siyasa ta rabu saboda sabanin akida. A shekarar 1889, ya karbi aikin farfesa a Jami'ar Sofia, wanda ya samar masa da kwanciyar hankali na ilimi a shekarunsa na baya.
Born in Chełm, Congress Poland, Russian: An haife shi a Chelm, Congress Poland, Daular Rasha.
Appointed Professor of History at Lviv U: An nada shi a matsayin Farfesa na Tarihi a Jami'ar Lviv da ke Austria-Hungary.
Publishes the first volume of his magnum: Ya buga kashi na farko na babban littafinsa, 'History of Ukraine-Rus''.
Elected head of the Central Rada (Counci: An zabe shi a matsayin shugaban Central Rada (Majalisa) a Kyiv bayan Juyin Juya Halin watan Fabrairu.
Elected President of the Ukrainian Peopl: An zabe shi a matsayin Shugaban Kasa na Ukrainian People's Republic.
Lives in exile in Vienna and Prague afte: Ya rayu a gudun hijira a Vienna da Prague bayan faduwar jamhuriyar.
Returns to Soviet Ukraine to continue hi: Ya koma Soviet Ukraine don ci gaba da ayyukansa na ilimi.
Arrested by the Soviet secret police (OG: Hukumar 'yan sandan sirri ta Soviet (OGPU) ta kama shi sannan an tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Moscow.
Dies under mysterious circumstances in K: Ya mutu a cikin yanayi na ban mamaki a Kislovodsk, Rasha.
Authored a monumental 10-volume history: Ya rubuta tarihin kashi 10 mai girma wanda ya kafa ci gaba na tarihin Ukraine, daban da tarihin Rasha da Poland.
First President of Ukraine: Shugaban Kasa na Farko na Ukraine
Served as the head of state of the first: Ya yi aiki a matsay인 shugaban kasa na farko na Ukraine ta zamani mai cin gashin kanta, watau Ukrainian People's Republic.
Transformed the society in Lviv into a p: Ya sauya kungiyar a Lviv ta zama babbar cibiyar ilimi ta harshen Ukraine, wadda ta zama kamar makarantar kimiyya ta farko.
His academic and political work was foun: Ayyukansa na ilimi da siyasa sun kasance ginshiki wajen tsara kishin kasa da kuma rubuta tarihin Ukraine na zamani.
Was Hrushevsky a socialist?: Shin Hrushevsky mai ra'ayin gurguzu ne?
Yes, he was a moderate socialist and a l: E, ya kasance mai ra'ayin gurguzu mai sassauci kuma babban memba na Ukrainian Party of Socialist-Revolutionaries, wadda ta goyi bayan cin gashin kai na kasa, muryar jama'a, da kuma gyaran filaye ga talakawa.
Why did he return to Soviet Ukraine in 1: Me yasa ya koma Soviet Ukraine a shekarar 1924?
He returned under the Soviet 'Ukrainizat: Ya koma ne karkashin manufar Soviet ta 'Ukrainization', yana fatan zai iya ba da gudunmawa ga al'adu da ilimin Ukraine. Ya yi imanin cewa zai iya yi wa Ukraine abubuwa da yawa daga ciki, wata shawara da daga baya ta zama bak인 시기 yayin da gwamnatin Stalin ta tsananta zalunci.
What is Hrushevsky's legacy in Ukraine t: Menene gadon Hrushevsky a Ukraine a yau?
He is revered as a national hero and a f: Ana girmama shi a matsayin gwarzon kasa kuma daya daqun uban kasa na farko na Ukraine ta zamani. Hotonsa yana kan takardar kudin hryvnia 50, kuma ana kallon aikinsa a matsayin ginshikin karatun tarihin Ukraine da asalin kasa.
Did he finish his 10-volume history?: Shin ya kammala tarihin kashi 10 dinsa?
He completed and published all ten volum: Ya kammala kuma ya buga daukacin kashi guda goma, wanda ya shafi tarihin Ukraine tun lokacin da zuwa shekarun 1660. Aikinsa ya samar da cikakken bayani na ilimi don ikirarin Ukraine na da dogon tarihin kashin kanta.
An haife shi a Andijan a kwarin Fergana.
Ya hau karagar mulkin Fergana yana dan shekara 12.
Ya fara cin Samarkand da yaki amma da sauri ya rasa shi.
Ya ci Kabul da yaki sannan ya mayar da shi sabon sansaninsa.
Ya kayar da Ibrahim Lodi a Yakin Panipat na farko sannan ya mamaye Delhi.
Ya kayar da dakarun hadaka na Rajput a Yakin Khanwa sannan ya tabbatar da ikonsa.
Ya mutu a Agra, Daular Mughal.
파니파트 전투에서의 승리를 통해 인도 역사상 가장 강력한 제국 중 하나의: Ta hanyar nasararsa a Yakin Panipat, ya kafa ginshikin daya daqun dauloli mafi karfi a tarihin kasar India.
이슬람 문학 최초의 자서전 중 하나를 집필하여 자신의 삶과 시대에 대한: Ya rubuta daya daqun littattafan tarihin rayuwa na kashin kansa na farko a adabin Musulunci, wanda ya samar da babban haske game da rayuwarsa da zamaninsa.
인도 화약 전쟁의 선구자: Majagaba na Yakin Bindiga (Gunpowder Warfare) a India
야전 포병과 화기를 전략적으로 사용한 것은 인도에서의 군사적 승리에 핵심: Yin amfani da dabarun soja na bindigogi da manyan bindigogi a filin yaki shi ne babban dalilin nasarorinsa na soja a India.
'바부르'라는 이름은 '호랑이'를 의미하는 페르시아어에서 유래했으며, 전: Sunan 'Babur' ya fito ne daga harshen Farsi wanda ke nufin 'Zaki' (ko Tiger), kuma ya sami wannan sunan ne saboda jaruntakarsa a yakin.
사마르칸트는 왜 그에게 그토록 중요했나요?: Me yasa Samarkand yake da matukar mahimmanci a gare shi?
사마르칸트는 그의 조상인 티무르(타메를란)의 웅장한 수도였으며, 그곳을: Samarkand shi ne babban birni na kakansa Timur (Tamerlane), kuma sake kwace shi ya kasance burin daukacin rayuwarsa don tabbatar da hakkinsa na magajin Daular Timur.
바부르나마는 역사적으로 정확한가요?: Shin Baburnama yana da gaskiya ta tarihi?
바부르나마는 당대로서는 놀라울 정도로 솔직하고 정확한 것으로 평가받습니다: Ana kallon Baburnama a matsayin littafi mai cike da gaskiya da daidaito na zamaninsa. Kodayake an rubuta shi ne daga mahakuntansa kansa, ya bayyana nasarorinsa da gazawarsa daki-daki, wanda ya mayar da shi babban tushen tarihi.
Born as a 'porphyrogennitos' (born in th: An haife shi a matsayin 'porphyrogennitos' (an haife shi a dakin sarauta), dan Sarki Romanos II da Sarauniya Theophano.
Becomes senior emperor after the death o: Ya zama sarki mai iko bayan mutuwar John I Tzimiskes, amma ainihin ikon yana hannun Basil Lekapenos.
Faces and eventually crushes a series of: Ya fuskanci kuma daga baya ya murkushe jerin zanga-zangar cikin gida mai girma karkashin jagorancin manyan kwamandoji Bardas Skleros da Bardas Phokas.
Forms a crucial alliance with Vladimir I: Ya kulla kawance mai mahimmanci da Vladimir I na Kiev, inda ya sami dakarun soji 6,000 (tushen Varangian Guard) a madadin auren kanwarsa Anna.
Achieves a decisive victory over the Bul: Ya samu gagarumar nasara a kan sojojin Bulgaria a Yakin Kleidion.
Completes the conquest of the First Bulg: Ya kammala cin Daular Bulgaria ta Farko da yaki, inda ya hada ta gaba daya a cikin Daular Byzantine.
Dies while planning a military expeditio: Ya mutu lokacin da yake shirin yakin soja don sake kwace Sicily, inda ya bar daular a matsayinta mafi girma na yanki da kudi.
After a brutal, decades-long war, he com: Bayan wani yaki mai tsanani na tsawon shekaru da yawa, ya kayar da Daular Bulgaria ta Farko gaba daya, wadda ta kasance babbar abokiyar hamayyar daular a Turai na tsawon daruruwan shekaru.
He established the legendary Varangian G: Ya kafa shahararriyar runduna ta Varangian Guard, dakarun soji na musamman wadanda ke aiki a matsayin masu tsaron sarki na kashin kansa.
Through austere living, land reforms tar: Ta hanyar rayuwa ta tsantsani, gyaran filaye ga sarakunan daular, da kuma ingantaccen tsarin haraji, ya bar taskar mulki da babban ragi lokacin mutuwarsa.
He led successful campaigns against the: Ya jagoranci yakoki masu nasara yaki da Fatimid Caliphate da sauran ikoki na gabas, wanda ya kare kan iyakar Anatolia ta daular.
Why was he really called the 'Bulgar-Sla: Me yasa gaske ake kiran sa 'Bulgar-Slayer'?
He earned the epithet 'Boulgaroktonos' f: Ya sami lakabin 'Boulgaroktonos' saboda gagarumin yaki da murkushe Daular Bulgaria da ya yi. Sunan ya kasance tare da shi bayan nasararsa a Kleidion a shekarar 1014, inda aka ce ya makantar da fursunonin yaki na Bulgaria guda 15,000.
Did he ever marry or have children?: Shin ya taba yin aure ko kuwa yana da yara?
No. Basil II dedicated his life entirely: A'a. Basil II ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa gaba daya ga kasa da soja. Bai taba yin aure ba kuma ya mutu ba tare da haihuwa ba, wanda a karshe ya haifar da rikicin neman magaji sannan ya taimaka wajen faduwar daular Macedonian bayan mutuwarsa.
What was his relationship with the Kieva: Yaya dangantakarsa take da Kievan Rus'?
He formed a pivotal alliance with Vladim: Ya kulla kawance mai mahimmanci da Vladimir Mai Girma. A madadin taimakon soja (Varangian Guard) da kuma auren Anna kanwar Basil, Vladimir ya koma addinin Kirista na Orthodox, wanda ya haifar da shigar daukacin Kievan Rus' addinin Kirista.
Was he a good administrator?: Shin shi mai gudanarwa ne mai kyau?
Yes, he was a highly effective administr: E, ya kasance mai gudanarwa mai inganci sosai. Ya takaita ikon sarakuna masu filaye, ya gyara tsarin haraji don ya kasance mai adalci da inganci, sannan ya yi amfani da tsantsanin kudi sosai, wanda ya bar daular da dukiya mai yawa.
Born in Pingyang, which is modern-day Li: An haife shi a Pingyang, wanda yake zama Linfen, Shanxi, China ta yanzu.
Departs from the Eastern Jin capital of: Ya bar babban birnin Eastern Jin watau Chang'an don tafiya kasar India neman littattafan addinin Buddha.
Successfully crosses the Taklamakan Dese: Ya yi nasarar tsallake Hamadar Taklamakan da Tsaunin Pamir mai hadari, inda ya isa Arewa maso Yammacin India.
Travels extensively through northern Ind: Ya yi tafiya sosai a Arewacin India, yana koyon harshen Sanskrit da tara littattafai, inda ya shafe shekaru uku a Pataliputra.
Travels to Sri Lanka (the 'Lion Kingdom': Ya tafi Sri Lanka ('Masarautar Zaki') don samun karin littattafai, sannan ya fara tafiyarsa ta teku mai hadari zuwa gida.
After surviving severe storms and an unp: Bayan ya tsira daga guguwa mai tsanani da kuma tsayawa a Java ba tare da shiri ba, a karshe ya koma kasar China a Laoshan, Shandong ta yanzu.
Resides in Jiankang (modern Nanjing), wh: Ya zauna a Jiankang (Nanjing ta yanzu), inda ya fassara littattafan da ya tara sannan ya rubuta labarin tafiyarsa, 'A Record of Buddhist Kingdoms' (Foguo Ji).
Dies at Xin Monastery in Jingzhou at the: Ya mutu a Xin Monastery da ke Jingzhou yana dan kimanin shekaru 85.
Completed a 14-year overland and sea jou: Ya kammala tafiya ta kasa da teku ta tsawon shekaru 14 daga China zuwa India da komawa gida don dawo da littattafan addinin Buddha a lokacin da yake da manyan shekaru.
A Record of Buddhist Kingdoms (Foguo Ji): A Record of Buddhist Kingdoms (Foguo Ji)
Authored one of history's most important: Ya rubuta daya daqun muhimman labaran tafiya na tarihi, wanda ya samar da shaidar gani da ido ta musamman ta Tsakiya da Kudancin Asiya a farkon karni na 5.
Translated key Sanskrit texts into Chine: Ya fassara muhimman littattafan Sanskrit zuwa harshen Sinanci, musamman Mahasamghika Vinaya, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a kan dabi'un sufaye a Gabashin Asiya.
Why did Faxian travel to India?: Me yasa Faxian ya yi tafiya zuwa India?
He was distressed by the incomplete and: Ya shiga damuwa saboda rashin cika da rashin daidaito na dokokin Vinaya (dokokin sufaye) da ke kasar China, don haka ya nemi samun cikakken tsarin asali daga India, mahaifar addinin Buddha.
How long did Faxian's journey take?: Nawa ne tsawon lokacin tafiyar Faxian ya dauka?
His entire pilgrimage, from leaving Chan: Daukacin tafiyarsa ta addini, tun daga barin Chang'an zuwa komawa China, ta dauki kimanin shekaru 14-15, daga wajen 399 zuwa 414 CE.
Is Faxian's travelogue historically accu: Shin labarin tafiyar Faxian yana da gaskiya ta tarihi?
Yes, 'A Record of Buddhist Kingdoms' (Fo: E, ana kallon 'A Record of Buddhist Kingdoms' (Foguo Ji) a matsayin babban tushe mai gaskiya da kuma kima ga tarihi, labarin kasa, da yanayin addini na yankunan da ya ziyarta a farkon karni na 5.
Did Faxian travel alone?: Shin Faxian ya yi tafiyar shi kadai ne?
No, he started his journey from Chang'an: A'a, ya fara tafiyarsa ne daga Chang'an tare da wasu sufaye, ciki har da Huijing, Daozheng, Huiying, da Huiwei. Sai dai sakamakon tsananin wahalar tafiyar, wasu sun mutu yayin da wasu kuma suka zabi zama a India, don haka a karshe Faxian ya koma China shi kadai daga cikin kungiyar tasu ta farko.
Born in Germania, a fortified town in wh: An haife shi a Germania, wani birni mai katanga a cikin kasar Bulgaria ta yanzu.
Appointed as a general on the eastern fr: Sarki Justin I ya nada shi a matsayin kwamandan soja a gabashin iyakar kasa.
Plays a key role in suppressing the Nika: Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen murkushe bore na Nika a Constantinople, wanda ya kare karagar mulki ta Sarki Justinian.
Leads the Vandalic War, conquering the V: Ya jagoranci Yakin Vandalic, inda ya ci Masarautar Vandal da ke Arewacin Afirka a kasa da shekara guda.
Leads the initial and most significant c: Ya jagoranci kashi na farko kuma mafi mahimmanci na Yakin Gothic don sake kwace Italiya daga hannun Ostrogoths.
Captures the Ostrogothic capital of Rave: Ya kwace babban birnin Ostrogoths na Ravenna da sarkinsu Witiges.
In retirement, he is recalled to defend: A lokacin ritayarsa, an sake kiran sa don kare Constantinople daga mamayar Kutrigur Bulgar, wadda ya yi nasarar dakatar da ita.
Accused of conspiracy against Justinian,: An zarge shi da kulla makirci yaki da Justinian, aka wulakanta shi sannan aka daure shi na wani dan lokaci kafin a yafe masa.
Dies in Constantinople, a few months aft: Ya mutu a Constantinople, watanni kalilan bayan Sarkinsa Justinian.
He swiftly destroyed the Vandal Kingdom: Ya lalata Masarautar Vandal da ke Arewacin Afirka cikin sauri a kasa da shekara guda (533-534), wani aiki da ake kallo a matsayin kwararren shiri da aiwatarwa na soja.
He led the initial, largely successful p: Ya jagoranci kashi na farko mai nasara na Yakin Gothic, inda ya kwace Sicily, Naples, Roma, da kuma babban birnin Gothic na Ravenna yaki da dakarun soji da suka fi shi yawa.
He fought with distinction against the S: Ya yi yaki na musamman yaki da Sassanian Empire, inda ya kare iyakar gabas ta Daular Byzantine a Yakin Dara.
His decisive and ruthless action alongsi: Matakinsa na karshe da na rashin tausayi tare da Narses ya murkushe babban boren birni a shekarar 532, wanda ya kare karagar mulki ta Justinian ga rushewa.
Was Belisarius really blinded and forced: Shin da gaske ne an makantar da Belisarius sannan aka tilasta masa yin bara?
This is a popular legend that emerged in: Wannan wata shahararriyar tatsuniya ce da ta bayyana a Lokacin Tsakiya (Middle Ages), amma babu shaidar tarihi ta lokacin da ke goyon bayan hakan. An wulakanta shi kuma aka daure shi na wani dan lokaci a shekarar 562, amma Sarki Justinian ya maido masa da kayansa da 'yancinsa.
Why was Emperor Justinian so suspicious: Me yasa Sarki Justinian yake shakarsa sosai?
Belisarius's immense popularity, stunnin: Shaharar Belisarius mai girma, nasarorinsa na soja masu ban mamaki, da kuma cewa Goths sun ba shi karagar mulki ta Yamma ya mayar da shi abokin hamayya a idon Justinian da fadarsa wadanda ke yawan shakka.
Who was the main historian who wrote abo: Wane ne babban masanin tarihi da ya rubuta game da Belisarius?
His personal secretary, Procopius of Cae: Sakatarensa na kashin kansa, Procopius na Caesarea, ya rubuta bayanai da yawa game da yakin da ya yi a cikin 'The Wars of Justinian' sannan ya samar da ra'ayi mai tsanani da bankado asiri a cikin 'Secret History' da aka buga bayan mutuwarsa.
Born into a family of minor Ukrainian no: An haife shi a cikin dangi na sarakunan Ukraine marasa karfi.
Captured by the Ottomans at the Battle o: Ottomans sun kama shi a Yakin Cecora sannan ya shafe shekaru biyu a tsare.
The \"Chyhyryn affair\" where Polish off: Maganar "Chyhyryn" inda jami'in Poland Daniel Czapliński ya kwace filayensa, wanda ya haifar da adawar kashin kansa da ta tayar da boren kasa gaba daya.
Begins the Khmelnytsky Uprising, securin: Ya kaddamar da Boren Khmelnytsky, inda ya samu manyan nasarori a Zhovti Vody da Korsun.
Signs the Treaty of Zboriv, which recogn: Ya sa hannu a kan Yarjejeniyar Zboriv, wadda ta amince da Cossack Hetmanate a matsayin yanki mai cin gashin kai a cikin Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth.
Suffers a major defeat at the Battle of: Ya fuskanci babban kashi a Yakin Berestechko bayan dakarun Tatar da ke kawance da shi sun bar shi.
Signs the Treaty of Pereiaslav, placing: Ya sa hannu a kan Yarjejeniyar Pereiaslav, wadda ta sanya Cossack Hetmanate karkashin tsaron Tsar na Muscovy.
Dies in Chyhyryn, leaving behind a nasce: Ya mutu a Chyhyryn, inda ya bar sabuwar kasa amma mara karko ga magadansa.
Successfully organized and led a massive: Ya yi nasarar tsara da kuma jagorantar babban boren jama'a yaki da karfin Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth.
Created the first semi-independent Ukrai: Ya samar da kasa ta farko mai cin gashin kai ta Ukrainian Cossack, wadda ta zama ginshikin asalin kasar Ukraine na zamani.
Achieved a series of stunning military v: Ya samu jerin nasarori na soja masu ban mamaki yaki da dakarun Poland, wanda ya nuna kwararren jagorancin dabarun yaki.
Was Khmelnytsky a hero or a villain?: Shin Khmelnytsky gwarzo ne ko kuwa mummuna?
He is a deeply controversial figure. To: Mutum ne mai matukar cece-kuce. Ga mutanen Ukraine da dama, shi gwarzon kasa ne wanda ya kafa kasarsu ta farko ta zamani. Ga mutanen Poland da Yahudawa, gadonsa yana da matukar muni saboda tsananin yaki da kisan kiyashi da aka yi lokacin boren.
It was a pivotal moment. Seeking protect: Ya kasance lokaci mai mahimmanci. Domin neman tsaro daga Poland, Khmelnytsky ya kulla kawance da Tsardom na Muscovy. Wasu suna kallon wannan mataki a matsayin wani abu da ba za a iya kauce masa ba don rayuwa, yayin da wasu kuma ke kallonsa a matsayin lokacin da Ukraine ta musanya ikon Poland da na Rasha, wanda ya haifar da tasirin Rasha na tsawon daruruwan shekaru.
Why did the uprising involve such widesp: Me yasa boren ya hada da zafafan yaki yaki da Yahudawa?
The Jewish population was often associat: Yawancin Yahudawa suna da alaka da sarakunan Poland (szlachta) a matsayin masu karbar kudin filaye da haraji (arendators), wanda ya mayar da su masaukin fushin masu tayar da kayar baya yaki da tsarin tattalin arziki da al'umma. Boren ya fito da kiyayya da aka dade ana boye ta, wanda ya haifar da kisan kiyashi mai ban tsoro.
Emerged as chieftain of the Ashina Turks: Ya bayyana a matsayin shugaban Ashina Turks, wadanda ke karkashin Rouran Khaganate.
Suppressed a Tiele revolt for the Rouran: Ya murkushe boren Tiele ga Rouran sannan ya nemi auren yar sarki ta Rouran a matsayin kyauta.
The Rouran Khagan Anagui refused and ins: Sarkin Rouran Anagui ya ki yarda sannan ya wulakanta Bumin, wanda ya kaddamar da boren Turkic.
Allied with the Western Wei, married Pri: Ya kulla kawance da Western Wei, ya auri Yar sarki Changle, sannan ya kayar da dakarun Rouran. Sarkin Rouran Anagui ya kashe kansa.
Declared himself Ilig Qaghan at the Otuk: Ya shelanta kansa a matsayin Ilig Qaghan a babban birnin Otuken, inda ya kafa Daular Turkic ta Farko (First Turkic Khaganate).
Died shortly after founding the Khaganat: Ya mutu jim kadan bayan kafa daular. An nada dan uwansa Istami a matsayin Yabgu (sarki) na yankunan yamma.
Led a successful rebellion against the R: Ya jagoranci boren nasara yaki da Rouran Khaganate, wadanda suka dade suna mulkar mutanensa.
Established the First Turkic Khaganate i: Ya kafa Daular Turkic ta Farko a shekarar 552, wanda ya fara sabon lokaci na karfin Turkic a Eurasia.
Strategic Alliance with Western Wei: Kawance na Dabarun Yaki da Western Wei
Secured a crucial alliance with the Chin: Ya tabbatar da kawance mai mahimmanci da daular Sin ta Western Wei, wadda ta amince da mulkinsa sannan ta samar masa da goyon bayan soja.
The Göktürks (or 'Celestial Turks') were: Göktürks (ko 'Celestial Turks') sun kasance hadakar kabilun Turkic a Tsakiyar Asiya ta da, wadanda Bumin Qaghan ya kafa su. Su ne kasa ta farko ta Turkic da ta yi amfani da sunan 'Türk' a fannin siyasa.
'Qaghan' (or Khagan) is a title of imper: 'Qaghan' (ko Khagan) lakabi ne na matsayin sarki a harsunan Turkic, Mongol, da sauran kabilun makiyaya, daidai yake da matsayin sarki mai iko gaba daya.
Why was being a blacksmith significant?: Me yasa zama makerin gwal (blacksmith) yake da mahimmanci?
For steppe nomads, blacksmiths were high: Ga makiyaya na steppe, makera suna da matukar girmamawa da kuma tsoro, inda ake imanin cewa suna da ikon musamman a kan wuta da karafa. Saboda haka, wulakancin da Sarkin Rouran ya yi wa Bumin ta hanyar kiran sa 'bawan makeri', ya kasance babban cin fuska ga al'umma da al'adu.
Born, the illegitimate son of Sviatoslav: An haife shi a matsayin dan shege na Sviatoslav I na Kyiv.
Defeats and kills his half-brother Yarop: Ya kayar kuma ya kashe dan uwansa na wajen uba Yaropolk, inda ya zama Grand Prince na Kyiv.
Is baptized into Orthodox Christianity i: Ya shiga addinin Kirista na Orthodox a Chersonesus, sannan ya auri yar sarki ta Byzantine Anna Porphyrogenita.
Organizes the mass baptism of the people: Ya tsara shigar addini na daukacin mutanen Kyiv a kogin Dnieper, wanda ya kaddamar da shigar addinin Kirista a Rus'.
Dies at Berestove, near Kyiv, after ruli: Ya mutu a Berestove, kusa da Kyiv, bayan ya yi mulki na shekaru 35.
He consolidated the lands of the Rus' fr: Ya tattara yankunan Rus' daga Tekun Baltic zuwa Tekun Black, inda ya hada kabilun East Slavic daban-daban karkashin mulkinsa.
Christianization of Kievan Rus': Shigar da Kievan Rus' Addinin Kirista
His adoption of Orthodox Christianity in: Karbar addinin Kirista na Orthodox da ya yi a shekarar 988 a matsayin addinin kasa ya zama babban lokaci a tarihin Gabashin Turai.
Following his conversion, he established: Bayan shigarsa addini, ya kafa makarantu, coci-coci, da kotunan coci, wanda ya kafa ginshikin sabuwar al'umma ta Kiristoci.
Why is he called 'the Great'?: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Mai Girma'?
He is called 'the Great' for unifying th: Ana kiran sa 'Mai Girma' saboda hada yankunan Kievan Rus' da ya yi da kuma babban shawararsa ta shigar da daular addinin Kirista, wanda ya tsara asalin al'adunta da addininta na tsawon shekaru da yawa.
Yes, despite his brutal early life as a: E, duk da cewa rayuwarsa ta farko ta arna tana da muni, ibadarsa ta baya da aikinsa wajen kafa addinin Kirista ya sa aka nada shi a matsayin tsarkaka a cikin Cocin Orthodox, inda aka san shi da 'Saint Vladimir the Equal-to-the-Apostles'.
Why did he choose Orthodoxy over other r: Me yasa ya zabi addinin Orthodox a kan sauran addinai?
His envoys were awestruck by the beauty: Wakilansa sun cika da mamaki saboda kyawun ibada a Hagia Sophia da ke Constantinople. Wannan, tare da dabarar samun kawance na soja da na aure da Daular Byzantine mai karfi, ya mayar da addinin Orthodox ya zama zabi mafi kyau.
Born in Saint Petersburg, Russian Empire: An haife shi a Saint Petersburg, Daular Rasha.
Graduates from Saint Petersburg State Un: Ya kammala karatu a Jami'ar Saint Petersburg State.
Becomes a full member of the St. Petersb: Ya zama cikakken memba na St. Petersburg Academy of Sciences.
Founds and becomes the first president o: Ya kafa kuma ya zama shugaba na farko na Ukrainian Academy of Sciences a Kyiv.
Becomes director of the newly founded Ra: Ya zama darekta na Radium Institute da aka kafa a Petrograd.
Publishes his seminal work, \"The Biosph: Ya buga shahararren littafinsa "The Biosphere" da harshen Rasha (an fassara shi zuwa harshen Faransanci a shekarar 1929).
Publishes his final paper on the noosphe: Ya buga takardar bincikensa ta karshe a kan noosphere.
Ya mutu a Moscow, Tarayyar Soviet.
He redefined the biosphere as the global: Ya sake bayyana biosphere a matsayin tsarin muhalli na duniya wanda ke hada daukacin halittu masu rai da alakar su, ciki har da alakar su da lithosphere, hydrosphere, da kuma atmosphere.
He established biogeochemistry as a new: Ya kafa biogeochemistry a matsayin sabon fannin kimiyya, wanda ke nazarin hanyoyin chemistry da hanyoyin da ke motsawa ko shafar ayyukan halittu.
He theorized the noosphere as the third: Ya bayyana noosphere a matsayin mataki na uku na ci gaban duniya, bayan geosphere da biosphere, wanda ke nuna fannin hankali da sani na dan adam a matsayin karfin kasa (geological force).
He was a principal founder and the first: Shi ne babban mai kafa kuma shugaba na farko na Ukrainian Academy of Sciences, inda ya kafa babban cibiyar binciken kimiyya a Kyiv.
What is the difference between the biosp: Menene banbanci tsakanin biosphere da noosphere?
The biosphere is the global sum of all e: Biosphere ita ce daukacin tsarin muhalli na duniya, yankin rayuwa a duniya. Noosphere kuma tunanin Vernadsky ne na mataki na gaba na ci gaba, inda hankali da sani na dan adam ke zama babban karfi da ke tsara biosphere.
How is Vernadsky's work related to the G: Yaya aikin Vernadsky yake da alaka da Gaia hypothesis?
Vernadsky's concept of the biosphere as: Tunanin Vernadsky na biosphere a matsayin karfin kasa wanda ke sauya duniyar ya riga kuma ya yi tasiri a kan Gaia hypothesis ta James Lovelock, wadda ke kallon duniya a matsayin tsarin da ke sarrafa kansa. Sai dai, binciken Vernadsky ya fi mayar da hankali kan tasirin chemistry da physics na rayuwa, yayin da Gaia ke hada da ra'ayin tsarin sarrafa kansa ta hanyar feedback loops.
